hero.headline: Huntsville's *meticulous* painting crew
hero.subheadline: Every surface prepped right, every edge clean, every day on schedule.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Painting
services_section.subheading: From single rooms to whole houses — we handle it all

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Transform your home's interior with professional painting services including walls, ceilings, trim, and accent features using premium paints and expert techniques.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Protect and beautify your home's exterior with weather-resistant paints and professional application for siding, trim, doors, and shutters.

services.title: Cabinet Refinishing
services.description: Refresh your kitchen and bathroom cabinets with expert refinishing services, including sanding, priming, and applying durable finishes.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: Prepare surfaces for painting and maintain your property's appearance with professional pressure washing for driveways, decks, and exterior surfaces.

services.title: Drywall Repair
services.description: Complete drywall repair and patching services to ensure smooth, flawless surfaces before painting applications.

about.heading: Sergio & His Crew
about.body: We're a Huntsville painting team that shows up every morning ready to work. Meticulous prep, clean execution, and your project done when we say it will be.

reviews.name: Nancy R.
reviews.text: Great communication and completed job on time. Work was clean and excellent for our theater room. Highly recommend and we'll use them again.

reviews.name: Brendan K.
reviews.text: Sergio and his team were awesome. Very prompt and professional. Had our fence and pergola stained — not a speck of stain anywhere it shouldn't be.

reviews.name: Barbara M.
reviews.text: Came highly recommended by a neighbor for kitchen cabinets and bathrooms. Reasonable estimate, arrived promptly every morning, meticulously prepped everything.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Call Sergio for a free estimate. We'll walk through your project and give you honest, upfront pricing.
